holdings.infoBox: VTV is an equity ETF with a total of 326 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.15%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.87%, Berkshire Hathaway at 2.81%, Exxon Mobil at 2.30%, and Johnson & Johnson at 2.06%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Value ETF (VTV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Large Value index. The fund tracks an index of large-cap stocks in the US. Holdings are selected and weighed based on five value factors. VTV was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.
